context_notes: Wave 1 (3 autonomous plans) completed cleanly in sequential mode. Wave 2 starts with two checkpoint plans — 01-02 needs user to apply schema to Supabase before 01-03 can run. 01-06 auto-creates netlify.toml/README/keepalive but then halts for user to deploy. Wave 3 (01-03) and Wave 4 (01-07) follow after human actions.
